"ExportApk.BuildVariants": [ "release" ], "com.android.tools.idea.sqlite.queryhistory": [ "SELECT * FROM app_settings_table WHERE id=1", "SELECT base.count AS count, base.suffix AS suffix FROM ( SELECT count AS count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL ) AS base ", "SELECT title, count, suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count , suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT='1' UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL) )", "SELECT b.title as name_bookmarl, t.time, t.note, t.bookmark_id, i.idPT as project_id FROM time_notification_table t INNER JOIN bookmark_incubator b ON b.id = t.bookmark_id INNER JOIN incubator_table i ON i.id = b.idPT WHERE b.is_activity_bookmark = 1", "SELECT * FROM bookmark_incubator WHERE is_activity_bookmark = 1 and idPT ='2'" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "KND" ] } }
